disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe painful mouth ulcers with a burning raw sensation, worsening over three days and acutely worse in the last 24 hours
trigger_question_examples: What is troubling you today?
Can you describe what your mouth feels like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My whole mouth is on fire and covered in big painful sores. It's been building for three days but since this morning it's unbearable.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete inability to tolerate any oral fluids for approximately 14 hours because of pain on swallowing
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to drink anything?
When did you last manage to keep fluids down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't been able to drink anything since this morning — swallowing even my own spit makes me cry, so nothing's going down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient is approximately 10 days into a chemotherapy cycle for cancer
trigger_question_examples: Are you having any treatment at the moment?
Have you had any recent chemotherapy or cancer treatment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I'm having chemo for cancer. My last treatment was about ten days ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Temperature is borderline (37.4 C on a home thermometer) and must be actively monitored for any rise
trigger_question_examples: Have you checked your temperature?
Any fevers, shivers or shaking chills?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took my temperature and it was 37.4. I don't feel hot exactly, but I've been feeling really drained.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I haven't really thought about my temperature — I've just been focused on the pain.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Thick ropy saliva, dry mouth and reduced fluid output — early markers of volume depletion
trigger_question_examples: How is your mouth and saliva?
Have you noticed you're passing less urine or feel dehydrated?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My spit has gone really thick and stringy and my mouth is bone dry. I don't think I've been to the toilet much today.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked generalised fatigue and feeling wiped out
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself overall?
Are you unusually tired or weak?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel completely drained, much more than usual — like I've got no energy at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Over-the-counter paracetamol has been taken with no analgesic effect
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain?
Did the paracetamol help at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been taking paracetamol but it does absolutely nothing for this pain.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient lives alone with no one present to assist, increasing risk from rapid dehydration
trigger_question_examples: Is there someone with you at home?
Who is able to help you tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own. There's no one here with me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting of blood and no active heavy mouth bleeding reported (red-flag screen — pertinent negative)
trigger_question_examples: Have you vomited any blood?
Is your mouth bleeding heavily or are you seeing blood?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't been sick or vomited blood. The sores ache but they're not pouring blood.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dysarthria and drooling from pain on tongue movement, with distress
trigger_question_examples: Is it hard to talk or swallow your saliva?
Are you drooling or slurring?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm slurring because moving my tongue kills, and I keep drooling into a tissue because swallowing hurts too much.
